title: Daily Interview English
description: Daily 5-minute episodes: English patterns, interview frameworks, and speaking practice for tech professionals.
author: Ming Li

episodes.title: The Way I See It — 4-Second Pause Protocol
episodes.description: The very first episode. Today's pattern: 'The way I see it is...' for stating opinions without sounding defensive. Plus: the 4-Second Pause Protocol for unexpected interview questions.
episodes.pattern: The way I see it is...
